title: Building agentic systems that ship
excerpt: Notes on multi-agent orchestration, MCP integrations, and the infrastructure patterns behind production AI products.
bodyMarkdown:
## Why this blog exists

This portfolio is wired to **Sanity CMS** — posts you publish in the `bmoir-dev-portfolio` studio show up here automatically.

### What I'll write about

- Multi-agent orchestration and human-in-the-loop design
- MCP server development and enterprise integrations
- RAG pipelines, evaluation, and cost governance
- Shipping on Cloudflare Workers with AI Gateway

### Editing content

Open the Sanity studio (`cd bmoir-dev-portfolio && pnpm dev`), edit or create **Blog Post** documents, and publish. The site fetches published content at request time.

```ts
// The app reads these fields from Sanity:
// title, slug, excerpt, bodyMarkdown, publishedAt, tags, coverImage, author
```

More soon.
